notes: userId is REQUIRED by the input schema. When userId is set the flow persists output to Storage/Firestore (non-blocking on failure) — runner should use a dedicated eval uid; Firebase Admin creds needed or persistence just WARN-logs. advice[].pedagogy is EXCLUDED from script checks: it names a pedagogical principle (e.g. 'Scaffolding', 'Constructivism') that the model commonly keeps in English even for Indic-language output. gradeLevel/subject output fields are metadata, excluded. No gradeLevel input field exists on this schema (only question/language/subject/userId). All cases supply language explicitly so the wrapper skips the user-profile fetch. question is capped at 2000 chars.
